evals.prompt: Run the sweep script on cyy2: python run_rct.py +exp=bn design_space=graph_clf resource=gpu-4 sample_size=50
evals.expected_output: Command sent to the 'run' screen on cyy2 after git pull and venv activation

evals.prompt: How many Ray jobs are currently running on cyy2?
evals.expected_output: Run ray status on cyy2 and report the results

evals.prompt: Sync the latest code to cyy2
evals.expected_output: Check local branch, git push, then ssh cyy2 to confirm branch matches and git pull

evals.prompt: Get the training_error.txt artifact from MLflow run abc123 on cyy2
evals.expected_output: SCP the artifact from cyy2's mlruns directory and display its contents

evals.prompt: Run a single experiment on cyy2 using conf/adhoc/test.yaml
evals.expected_output: Push code, pull on server, then send 'python run_experiment_by_yaml.py conf/adhoc/test.yaml' to the 'run' screen session
